creator: jigboe@gmx.de
text:
On Fri, Jun 04, 2010 at 02:21:56PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/surf,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/147469 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/147469

The patch looks just fine and can be committed. Thanks!
